sentence: וַיַּרְא אֱלֹהִים אֶת־הָאוֹר כִּי־טוֹב וַיַּבְדֵּל אֱלֹהִים בֵּין הָאוֹר וּבֵין הַחֹשֶׁךְ

grammatical-notes.וַיַּרְא: Conjunction 'va' (waw-consecutive) + Verb 'yar' (Qal Imperfect 3ms). From 'ra-ah' (to see). Indicates a sequential act of observation and appraisal.
grammatical-notes.כִּי־טוֹב: Conjunction 'ki' (that) + Noun/Adjective 'tob' (good). Indicates the verdict of the inspection.
grammatical-notes.וַיַּבְדֵּל: Conjunction 'va' + Verb 'yabdel' (Hiphil Imperfect 3ms). From 'badal' (to separate). The Hiphil stem denotes causative agency—He established the separation as a new reality.
grammatical-notes.בֵּין... וּבֵין: Preposition 'ben' (between) repeated. A standard Hebrew construction for marking a precise boundary between two distinct domains.

dictionary-meaning.וַיַּרְא: Then Elohim personally inspected and appraised — disclosing the deliberate act of forensic validation and eyewitness appraisal (Rule 33).
dictionary-meaning.כִּי־טוֹב: Witnessing that it was excellent in both function and nature — disclosing the authoritative 'Verdict' regarding the light's quality (Rule 13).
dictionary-meaning.וַיַּבְדֵּל: Personally established a sovereign and fixed boundary between — disclosing the causative Hiphil agency of establishing a permanent division (Rule 11).
dictionary-meaning.הַחֹשֶׁךְ: The darkness — the physical domain of obscurity, now legally distinguished from the light.

ראה.reason: The context of a creator evaluating his work requires a term for formal appraisal rather than passive sight.

main-translation: ***Then Elohim personally inspected and appraised the light, witnessing that it was excellent in both function and nature***; ***and Elohim personally established a sovereign and fixed boundary between the light and the darkness.***

main-translation-explanation.Then Elohim personally inspected and app: INTERNAL ADVERSARIAL TRIAL: Captures the 'Witness' role of the Creator performing a formal appraisal (Rule 33).
main-translation-explanation.witnessing that it was excellent in both: INTERNAL ADVERSARIAL TRIAL: Discloses the verdict of functional excellence for 'Tob' (Rule 13).
main-translation-explanation.personally established a sovereign and f: INTERNAL ADVERSARIAL TRIAL: Discloses the causative Hiphil agency of 'Badal' (Rule 11).
main-translation-explanation.between the light and the darkness: Consolidated into natural English boundary markers (Rule 20).

rejected-translations.reason: Passive tone that fails to disclose the active forensic appraisal of the work.

rejected-translations.phrase: separated the light from the darkness
rejected-translations.reason: Fails to disclose the authoritative 'Boundary' establishment implied by the Hiphil stem.
